pageSubtitle: Building, leading, and contributing to tech communities around the world.

items.description: Recognition for my contributions to local python communities. I give my voice to decisions made regarding the support or assistance of black python communities worldwide.
In charge of co-managing, organizing and sharing certain Python Cameroon events (online or in person), and helping members progress in Python programming.
Recognition for my contributions to the Django ecosystem in local communities. I have a voice in the appointment of the Board.
In charge of organizing free, open events on Google technologies throughout Yaounde. These events can be talks, workshops, conferences, etc…
In charge of organizing and sharing certain Django Cameroon events (online or face-to-face), and helping members with their Django difficulties.

In charge of the management of the Computer Club of the University of Yaoundé I, organizing useful events for students, guiding them in their academic problems and offering them opportunities in academic and/or professional fields.

items.communityName: Google Developer Student Clubs - University of Yaounde I
items.description: I organised events at my university on technologies to enable members to learn more about them
